scripts.build: node scripts/prebuild.js && node scripts/clean-dist.js && vite build && npx tsx scripts/ssg/prerender-spa.ts && npx tsx scripts/ssg/prerender-audit.ts
scripts.db:generate: node -e "console.error('DEPRECATED: use npm run catalog:import'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.db:generate:fast: node -e "console.error('DEPRECATED: use npm run catalog:import'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.catalog:import: npx tsx scripts/import-fipe.ts --fase tudo && npx tsx scripts/build-search-index.ts
scripts.catalog:prices: npx tsx scripts/import-fipe.ts --fase precos && npx tsx scripts/build-search-index.ts
scripts.catalog:seed: npm run catalog:import-fipex && npm run catalog:enrich && npm run catalog:search && npm run sitemap
scripts.catalog:seo-all: node scripts/build-seo-index.js && node scripts/seo-expansion-report.js && node scripts/generate-sitemap.js
scripts.catalog:semantic-all: node scripts/build-semantic-index.js && node scripts/semantic-scale-report.js && node scripts/generate-sitemap.js
scripts.enrich:all: npm run enrich:raw && npm run enrich:normalize && npm run enrich:vehicles && npm run enrich:build
scripts.datasets:inmetro:download:all: npm run datasets:inmetro:discover && npx tsx scripts/datasets/inmetro/download-pbev.ts --force
scripts.datasets:inmetro:all: npm run datasets:inmetro:download:latest && npm run datasets:inmetro:extract && npm run datasets:inmetro:normalize
scripts.datasets:specs:pipeline: npm run datasets:matching:analyze && npm run datasets:manufacturers:crawl -- --all && npm run datasets:specs:master && npm run datasets:specs:coverage && npm run datasets:coverage:ranking
scripts.datasets:all: npm run datasets:inmetro:extract && npm run datasets:inmetro:normalize && npm run datasets:coverage && npm run datasets:summary
scripts.catalog:complete: npm run datasets:inmetro:download:all && npm run datasets:inmetro:extract && npm run datasets:inmetro:normalize && npm run enrich:normalize && npm run datasets:build-specs && npm run enrich:vehicles && npm run enrich:build && npm run datasets:coverage && npm run datasets:roadmap && npm run datasets:list-complete && npm run datasets:search-index && npm run datasets:coverage-audit && npm run datasets:dashboard
scripts.datasets:specs:full: npm run datasets:manufacturers:crawl -- --all && npm run datasets:specs:master && npm run datasets:coverage:ranking && npm run datasets:vehicle-relations
scripts.datasets:oem:acquire: npm run datasets:oem:discover && npm run datasets:catalogs:discover && npm run datasets:library:sync && npm run datasets:manufacturers:crawl -- --all --discover && npm run datasets:specs:master && npm run datasets:seeds:impact && npm run datasets:platform:build && npm run datasets:coverage:family && npm run datasets:maintenance:acquire
scripts.datasets:library:acquire: npm run datasets:library:discover && npm run datasets:library:sync && npm run datasets:library:metrics && npm run datasets:engine:build && npm run datasets:transmission:build && npm run datasets:maintenance:graph
scripts.datasets:pipeline:automotive: npm run datasets:dae:acquire && npm run datasets:catalogs:discover && npm run datasets:oem:discover && npm run datasets:manufacturers:crawl -- --all --discover && npm run datasets:specs:master && npm run datasets:seeds:impact && npm run datasets:platform:build && npm run datasets:engine:build && npm run datasets:engine:master && npm run datasets:transmission:build && npm run datasets:maintenance:acquire && npm run datasets:maintenance:master && npm run datasets:maintenance:graph && npm run datasets:coverage:family && npm run datasets:coverage:ranking && npm run datasets:acquisition:dashboard
scripts.ssg:prepare: npm run ssg:prepare-bundles && npm run ssg:audit-bundles
scripts.ssg:portal: npm run ssg:prepare-bundles && npm run ssg:build-hubs && npm run ssg:audit-bundles
